assignments.description: Adds the ID of the current authorization form text record to the AuthorizationFormIds collection.
assignments.name: AddAuthorizationFormIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Authorization Form ID to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the field values for DigitalVerification and then adds it to the DigitalVerifications collection. Lastly, adds 1 to the DigitalVerificationRecordsCount value.
assignments.name: AddDigitalVerificationToCollection
assignments.label: Add Digital Verification to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the field values for InfoAuthorizationFormConsent and then adds it to the InfoAuthorizationFormConsents collection.
assignments.name: AddInfoAuthorizationFormConsentToCollection
assignments.label: Add Info Authorization Form Consent to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the field values for UpdatedDigitalVerification and then adds it to the UpdatedDigitalVerifications collection. Lastly, subtracts 1 from the DigitalVerificationRecordsCount value.
assignments.name: AddUpdatedDigitalVerificationToCollection
assignments.label: Add Updated Digital Verification to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error creating the authorization form consent records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageCreateAuthorizationFormConsentRecords
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t create authorization form consent records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error creating the digital verification records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageCreateDigitalVerificationRecords
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t create digital verification records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error creating the info authorization request record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageCreateInfoAuthorizationRequestRecord
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t create the info authorization request record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the number of records in UpdatedDigitalVerifications doesn’t match the DigitalVerificationRecordsCount value.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageDigitalVerificationsNotUpdated
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t create Authorization Form Consent records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the authorization form text records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAuthorizationFormTexts
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the authorization form text records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the authorization request form records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetAuthorizationRequestForms
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the authorization request form records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the data use purpose record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetDataUsePurpose
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the data use purpose record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the info authorization request form records.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetInfoAuthorizationRequestForms
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the info authorization request form records.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting the user record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageGetUser
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: Something went wrong and we couldn’t get the user record.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the required inputs aren’t passed into the flow.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageRequiredInputsMissing
assignments.label: Set Error Message

value.stringValue: We couldn’t find values for data use purpose ID, candidate ID, consentgiver ID, language and locale, authorization form text ID, or auth form consenter ID.

assignments.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when the user record is missing.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageUserRecordMissing
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the message that the flow returns after the digital verification records are created.
assignments.name: SetSuccessMessage
assignments.label: Set Success Message

decisions.description: Determines whether all the digital verification records were updated by checking if the value of DigitalVerificationRecordsCount is zero.
decisions.name: AreAllDigitalVerificationsUpdated
decisions.label: Are All Digital Verifications Updated?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Comment of the current digital verification record matches the Info Authorization Request Form ID of the current authorization form consent record.
decisions.name: DoesAuthorizationFormConsentMatchDigitalVerification
decisions.label: Does Authorization Form Consent Match Digital Verification?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Authorization Form Text ID of the current authorization form text record matches the Authorization Form Text ID of the current info authorization request form record.
decisions.name: DoesAuthorizationFormTextMatchInfoAuthorizationRequestForm
decisions.label: Does Authorization Form Text Match Info Authorization Request Form?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Authorization Form ID of the current authorization form record matches the Authorization Form ID of the current info authorization form text record.
decisions.name: DoesAuthorizationFormTextMatchInfoAuthorizationRequestForm2
decisions.label: Does Authorization Form Match Authorization Form Text?

decisions.description: Determines whether digital verification records were found by checking if DigitalVerificationRecordsCount is greater than zero.
decisions.name: HaveDigitalVerificationRecords
decisions.label: Have Digital Verification Records?

decisions.description: Determines whether a data use purpose ID, candidate ID, consent giver ID, language and locale, authorization form text ID, or auth form consenter ID was passed into the flow.
decisions.name: HaveRequiredInputValue
decisions.label: Have Required Input Value?

decisions.description: Determines whether a user record was found by checking if the User from GetUser record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveUserRecord
decisions.label: Have User Record?

decisions.description: Determines whether a digital signature is required for the authorization forms by checking if IsSignatureRequired is set to True.
decisions.name: IsDigitalSignatureRequired
decisions.label: Is Digital Signature Required?

decisions.description: Determines whether digital verification records need to be created checking if sDigitalVerificationRequired is set to True.
decisions.name: IsDigitalVerificationRecordCreationRequired
decisions.label: Is Digital Verification Required?

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each authorization form consent record in the AuthorizationFormConsents record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationFormConsents
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Consents

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each authorization form record in the Authorization Forms from GetAuthorizationForms record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationForms
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Forms

loops.description: Repeat actions in a loop for each authorization form text record in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationFormTexts
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Texts

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each authorization form text record in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAuthorizationFormTexts2
loops.label: Iterate Over Authorization Form Texts

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each digital verification record in the DigitalVerifications record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverDigitalVerifications
loops.label: Iterate Over Digital Verifications

loops.description: Repeats actions in a loop for each info authorization request form record in the Info Authorization Request Forms from GetInfoAuthorizationRequestForms record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverInfoAuthorizationRequestForms
loops.label: Iterate Over Info Authorization Request Forms

recordCreates.description: Creates records using the values in the AuthorizationFormConsents record collection.
recordCreates.name: CreateAuthorizationFormConsentRecords
recordCreates.label: Create Authorization Form Consent Records

recordCreates.description: Creates records using the values in the UpdatedDigitalVerifications record collection.
recordCreates.name: CreateDigitalVerificationRecords
recordCreates.label: Create Digital Verification Records

recordCreates.description: Creates an info authorization request record using the values passed into the flow. Stores the ID of the new info authorization request record in the infoAuthorizationRequestId variable.
recordCreates.name: CreateInfoAuthorizationRequestRecord
recordCreates.label: Create Info Authorization Request Record

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form records with an ID in the AuthorizationFormRecordIds collection. Stores the result in the Authorization Forms from GetAuthorizationForms record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationForms
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Forms

recordLookups.description: Gets the authorization form text records with an ID that matches the ID in the authorizationFormTextIds collection. Stores the result in the Authorization Form Texts from GetAuthorizationFormTexts record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAuthorizationFormTexts
recordLookups.label: Get Authorization Form Texts

recordLookups.description: Gets the data use purpose record with an ID that matches the Data Use Purpose ID that’s passed into the flow. Stores the result in the Data Use Purpose from GetDataUsePurpose record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetDataUsePurpose
recordLookups.label: Get Data Use Purpose

recordLookups.description: Gets the info authorization request form records with an Info Authorization Request ID matching the ID in infoAuthorizationRequestId, and an AuthorizationFormTextId that’s in the AuthorizationFormTextIds collection. Stores the result in the Info Authorization Request Forms from GetInfoAuthorizationRequestForms record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetInfoAuthorizationRequestForms
recordLookups.label: Get Info Authorization Request Forms

recordLookups.description: Gets the user record with an Account ID or Contact ID that matches the consentGiverId that’s passed into the flow. Stores the result in the User from GetUser record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetUser
recordLookups.label: Get User

variables.description: Temporarily stores the info authorization form consent record to be created.
variables.name: AuthorizationFormConsent

variables.description: Stores the authorization form consent IDs that are passed into the flow.
variables.name: authorizationFormConsenterId

variables.description: Stores a collection of info authorization form consent records to be created.
variables.name: AuthorizationFormConsents

variables.description: Stores the application form IDs of the authorization form text record to process.
variables.name: AuthorizationFormIds

variables.description: Stores a collection of authorization form text IDs that are passed into the flow.
variables.name: authorizationFormTextIds

variables.description: Stores the research study candidate ID that represents the candidate that the clinical study pertains to, and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: candidateId

variables.description: Stores the record ID of the consent giver’s account record that’s passed to the flow.
variables.name: consentGiverId

variables.description: Stores the record ID of the data use purpose record passed to the flow.
variables.name: dataUsePurposeId

variables.description: Temporarily stores the digital verification record to be created.
variables.name: DigitalVerification

variables.description: Stores the number of the records in the DigitalVerifications record collection.
variables.name: DigitalVerificationRecordsCount

variables.description: Stores a collection of digital verification records to be created.
variables.name: DigitalVerifications

variables.description: Stores the error message that the flow returns when the flow execution fails.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: Stores the ID of the info authorization request record created by the flow. This value is available as output from the flow.
variables.name: infoAuthorizationRequestId

variables.description: Stores a Boolean value that indicates whether digital verification is required for the records in the AuthorizationFormConsents collection.
variables.name: isDigitalVerificationRequired

variables.description: Stores the language and locale of the consent document that’s presented to the consent giver, and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: languageAndLocale

variables.description: Temporarily stores the updated digital verification record to be created.
variables.name: UpdatedDigitalVerification

variables.description: Stores a collection of updated digital verification records to be created.
variables.name: UpdatedDigitalVerifications
